title: DC09 CMS Marketplace visibility and status display
description: Ensure DC09 CMS is visible in the Marketplace with correct status indicator

title: CMS required field validation
description: Prevent CMS from being saved without required fields

title: DC09 Account ID mandatory enforcement
description: Ensure Account ID is mandatory when a site forwards alarms to DC09 and site cannot be saved without it

title: DC09 alarm forwarding reliability
description: Ensure alarms are successfully forwarded to the DC09 CMS with correct account per site

title: DC09 encryption key handling
description: Ensure alarms are encrypted when encryption key is provided, and unencrypted when not

title: DC09 Alarm Forward Logs visibility
description: Ensure logs are visible on Device Dashboard with success/failure entries and near real-time updates

title: Outstream feature stability
description: Ensure Outstream feature loads without errors and Talos synchronization works correctly

title: Zone display correctness
description: Ensure zones are displayed correctly with all sensors visible per zone, no hidden or incorrectly merged sensors

title: Outstream data persistence on refresh
description: Ensure page refresh does not break data and site switching updates data correctly

title: Talos alarm reception in GCX
description: Verify alarms are received correctly from Talos in GCX

title: Auto streaming trigger reliability
description: Ensure alarms trigger auto streaming successfully and disabling prevents any streaming action

title: Zone-based streaming behavior
description: Ensure site-level and zone-based streaming work correctly with proper fallback for invalid zones

title: Zone change isolation
description: Ensure zone changes affect future alarms only, not existing ones

title: Camera streaming across devices
description: Ensure all cameras stream correctly for sites with single or multiple devices, and no streams start for sites without devices

title: Motion alarm quad view behavior
description: Ensure motion alarm opens quad automatically, even when viewing other cameras, with consistent behavior for repeated alarms

title: Alarm lifecycle quad workflow sync
description: Ensure canceling alarm closes quad and workflow, closing workflow closes quad, and reopening alarm opens quad again

title: Stream access permissions enforcement
description: Ensure unauthorized users cannot see or access streams and streaming UI is hidden for unauthorized roles

title: Streaming action audit logging
description: Ensure streaming actions, permission denials and failures are properly logged for compliance

title: Marketplace alarm management category visibility
description: Ensure Marketplace loads successfully with Alarm Management System category visible

title: CMS options listing completeness
description: Ensure all supported CMS options (Evalink Talos, Amwin, Lisa, Immix, Alice) are listed even when no CMS is configured

title: CMS state display accuracy
description: Ensure each CMS shows correct state (Not Configured/Configured)

title: CMS admin-only access control
description: Ensure only admin users can view and access CMS configuration

title: CMS overview page functionality
description: Ensure selecting a CMS opens overview page displaying supported alarm protocol, integration scope, and required configuration inputs
